name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant?=
subject: did you see the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=35e8b229ed&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| |
---
| | Friend

As promised, we have the full recording of last night’s debate. If you didn’t get a chance to tune in last night – you can watch it [HERE](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=d7e9d9e9a2&e=32f1a3df98).

If you’re getting these emails, I hope that means you’re already on board. Thank you, truly, for your support. I need to ask you to do just a little bit more – **_will you forward this email on to ten of your friends who are still undecided?_**

Reaching undecided voters is our primary focus right now. We’re reaching them with a comprehensive Get Out The Vote program and by pushing out our message online and on TV.

Of course, this takes resources. It takes even more resources given we’re fighting against a governor and deep pocketed special interests who are determined to defend that 32-year reign. **_They’re worried this year because their incumbent governor can’t break 50%, no matter how many millions of dollars he spends_**.

Can you send us a quick contribution? **[$35, $50, $150, or more](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=ab0bcf1c3f&e=32f1a3df98)** helps us support our teams out knocking doors and phone banking. A contribution of **[$250 or $500 or more](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=3047520fee&e=32f1a3df98)** helps us buy more airtime on TV.

Thank you for your support! Ballots are dropping in mailboxes now, so we can’t waste a single day!

**Bill Bryant**

---
| | | | | | | [](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=62c07b070c&e=32f1a3df98)

PO Box 2121, Tacoma, WA 98401

[unsubscribe](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=aea9d615cc&e=32f1a3df98&c=35e8b229ed)

name: Corry Bliss
subject: There's No Debate in Ohio's Senate Race
body:
| Peter \--

Rob and failed former Governor Ted Strickland just finished their final debate tonight in Cleveland. **Rob won, and the truth is there is no debate in Ohio's Senate race, and tonight we learned why.**

Ted Strickland can't hide from his failed record as governor when Ohio lost 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation, or in Congress when he failed to pass a single bill into law in 12 years. Meanwhile, Rob has a record of getting results for Ohio families and Ohio workers, passing legislation to combat human trafficking, tackle the heroin epidemic, and level the playing field on trade to protect Ohio jobs.

**That's why the momentum is behind our campaign,** and we've been endorsed by nine newspapers—including the _Cleveland Plain Dealer_ , the _Columbus Dispatch_ , the _Cincinnati Enquirer_ , and the _Youngstown Vindicator_ —and four unions, the Ohio Teamsters, the Ohio FOP, the IUOE Local 18, and the United Mine Workers of America, each of which previously endorsed Ted Strickland.

**We now have less than 20 days until Election Day**. Ohioans are already casting their votes across the state, and we can't let up. This weekend, we'll kick off our 80-stop, 4,000 mile "Countdown to Victory" RV Tour with Rob and Jane as they travel across the state meeting with volunteers and supporters.

Our team is well on the way to exceeding our goal of contacting 5 million voters before Election Day, and it's thanks to the hard work of thousands of interns and volunteers.

Please [click here to sign up to volunteer](https://www.robportman.com/volunteer?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate3&n=1) or [sign up to display a yard sign](https://www.robportman.com/yard_signs?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate3&n=2)!

Thanks,

Corry Bliss [](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate3&n=3 "Donate here!") [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate3&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate3&n=5)

---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate3&n=6). -=-=-

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Paul Ryan actually sent this email:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
It looks like you got Paul Ryan's attention. And he's not happy.
The Speaker of the House forwarded the email Bernie sent to you to his entire fundraising list. You can see what he said below.
**Paul Ryan really doesn't like that you donated more than $1.8 million in two days to take back the House and Senate**(which is an AMAZING feat, and something for which we are so grateful). He even put in a big, red button when he forwarded Bernie's email that says "HELP STOP SANDERS."
We've got their attention. Now let's show what we really can do.
[**Split a $3 contribution between Bernie's thirteen candidates for the House and Senate so we can take back Congress, make Bernie a committee chairman in a Democratic Senate, and enact our progressive agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full")
The incredible contributions you've made in the last two days are completely changing the dynamics of these races for Congress. We are so grateful, because your support means campaigns can train more volunteers, talk to more voters, and turn out more people on Election Day.
Paul Ryan knows the tremendous impact you're having, and he's scared. Let's keep it going.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full")**

\--- Fowarded Message --
From: Paul Ryan
Sent: Thursday, October 20, 2016 5:09 PM
Subject: FWD Bernie's Email (Please Read)
I spoke last week about what would happen if we lose our majority in Congress. It looks like Bernie Sanders was listening, because a staffer showed me the message he sent to his supporters yesterday....
Read it and find out why it is so important to hold the House and Senate this November.
**Bottom line: we must stop Bernie Sanders, Nancy Pelosi, and the Progressive Democrats from taking over Congress.** **Please consider making a donation today to stop this dangerous, progressive agenda.**
Thank you.
Let's do this,
Paul Ryan
House Speaker
\---
From: Bernie Sanders
Sent: Wednesday, October 19, 2016 1:39 PM
Subject: I hear you want me to have a gavel
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full")

Sisters and Brothers,
I heard what Paul Ryan said about me: that if the Republicans lose the Senate, I will be the chairman of the Senate Budget Committee.
That sounds like a very good idea to me. It means that we can establish priorities for working people, and not just the billionaire class.
What would be equally exciting is if the Democrats took back the House, and Congressman Ryan was no longer Speaker. That would mean the clearest possible path to enact our agenda - the most progressive agenda of any party in American history.
In the last day, you have responded tremendously to our call to support four leaders who will help shift the balance of the Senate. More than 20,000 people have contributed more than $900,000 to ten candidates who are inspired by the political revolution.
During our campaign we pushed ourselves to reach goals that many thought impossible. That is why we set a very big, very audacious goal that we didn't know if we could reach, but that we thought it was very important to try. But you're about to smash that $1 million goal.
So, we're going to need a bigger goal.
[**Let's raise $2 million before tonight's final FEC deadline of the campaign for candidates for the House and Senate. Can you start with a $3 contribution between Paul Clements, Catherine Cortez-Masto, Deborah Ross, Zephyr Teachout, Morgan Carroll, Nanette Barragan, and Rick Nolan?**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full")
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full")
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full")**
Consider for a moment the power that exists in the U.S. Senate. Right now, the Republican majority is using their power to block any meaningful action on addressing income inequality or climate change. In addition, without a Democratic majority the Senate is refusing to confirm federal judges and, incredibly, has left open a critical seat on the Supreme Court.
With a Democratic majority, we can change all of that. What Paul Ryan is specifically afraid of is the power of the budget committee. That committee defines the spending priorities of the entire government. The work of that committee says how much revenue the government should have, and where its money should go.
I have some thoughts on how the government should allocate its spending. I'm sure you do, too.
The first step to being able to enact our progressive agenda is taking back the Senate. And if we take back the House... well, the sky is the limit for what we can achieve.
[**Help us reach for our new, audacious goal of raising $2 million for candidates for the House and Senate by midnight tonight. Add a $3 contribution now split between Paul Clements, Catherine Cortez-Masto, Deborah Ross, Zephyr Teachout, Morgan Carroll, Nanette Barragan, and Rick Nolan.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/paul-ryan-sad?refcode=em161020-full")
Thank you for all you do.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

"" As a reminder: Nate Silver has said voters in New Hampshire have more influence on control of the Senate than voters in any other state, which means this is the most important Senate race in the country! "" Clock's ticking, Team Maggie P.S. -- If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline, thank you! Those gifts can take a little bit of time to process and may not be reflected here, but don't worry, we have it recorded. ""

subject: We’re Being Overrun
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
It's time to take our country back. |

Friend, The tidal wave has been coming for a while, and no one in Washington has been able to stop it. The truly shocking part? They turn away and hide from the problem that’s contaminating our country, and refuse to acknowledge, let alone take the steps to fix it. I’m talking about the politically correct, liberal, elitist ideals that are eroding this country. The corruption and backroom shady deals that we see from these professional politicians. The cover-ups over “lost” emails and horrible tragedies like Benghazi. It’s time to take our country back Friend. It’s time to STOP this inside-the-beltway nonsense. Will you join our movement to take our country back by contributing $35, $50, or $100 to our Final Election Push right now? We need to win on Election Day if we want any chance to stop this tidal wave of corruption and job-killing liberal policies that have been plaguing our nation’s capital and destroying our country. We can’t afford a Supreme Court packed with the liberal activist judges that Crooked Hillary will nominate. We can’t afford any more attacks on our Constitutional Rights. And we can’t afford to be so politically correct that it paralyzes our nation’s safety. Now more than ever Friend I need you to join our team. Will you help take our country back once and for all by donating $35, $50, or $100 right now? Friend, this election comes down to a simple question – do I stand by and watch my country continued to be destroyed, or do I take my country back? YES! I AM TAKING MY COUNTRY BACK Let’s take our country back together, Donald J. Trump
YES! I AM TAKING MY COUNTRY BACK

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: Link of the Week: Really, John McCain???
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
_This is our Link of the Week email -- the things that we're sharing around the office, and we think everyone on Team Maggie should know about. We hope you'll enjoy clicking around as much as we do._
It's already bad that Washington Republicans like Kelly Ayotte and Mitch McConnell have refused to hold hearings and move the Supreme Court confirmation process forward, but if the GOP keeps control of the Senate, the situation could get a whole lot worse. Check out what Republican Sen. John McCain pledged this week:
### **"I promise you that we will be united against any Supreme Court nominee that Hillary Clinton, if she were president, would put up."**
--Sen. John McCain (R-AZ)
What?! It's already unacceptable to have an 8-member SCOTUS, but can you imagine what would happen if the GOP holds the Senate majority and another seat on the Court opened up? **[The Washington Post spoke to a few legal experts to find out what that would look like-- and it's not a pretty picture.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdbf4/2a380d31/17d03aea/fc1f07/1935062618/VEsH/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/news/post-politics/wp/2016/10/17/progressives-ponder-the-unthinkable-a-postelection-supreme-court-blockade/")**
-- Team Maggie
P.S. -- Team, this is just one more reason Governor Hassan's race is so important: This is our best -- and maybe ONLY -- shot at taking back the Senate and securing the future of the Supreme Court, and if we can't break our deadlock in the polls and win on November 8, our country could suffer the consequences for _decades._
**[We've started our Victory Donor program, a group of people who are all in for Maggie through the election and beyond-- and we're locking the list at midnight tonight. Give $3 to make the list, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdbf4/2a380d31/17d03aea/fc1f00/1935062618/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDIxX0xPVFciLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161021_LOTW&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdbf4/2a380d31/17d03aea/fc1f00/1935062618/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDIxX0xPVFciLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161021_LOTW&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

Friend,
Our opponents are keeping close tabs on us, and we have a chance to show them Team Holcomb’s strength and momentum!**
****On Monday, we will close the finance books on our 2016 Statewide Candidate Quarterly Report — and then our final fundraising numbers will go public on[November 1](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/aecdf98991ed4bd4b6ee4e6b3af59e5b?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=f8537cc2d8d8488e8feda7202c9ae1c8&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_1&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20161021-this-is-final-16266-direct) (just DAYS before the election!)**
If we can come together to reach our fundraising goal of $50,000, our opponents will have no choice but to back down — and victory on Election Day will be ours.
[**Contribute today and your donation will directly impact our shot at victory.**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/c216675a1fb04a519af25de80d5cca38?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=f8537cc2d8d8488e8feda7202c9ae1c8&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_2&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20161021-this-is-final-16266-direct)**

name: Senator Al Franken
subject: Halloween surprise
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4953481448578351104/9015951367298088960?refcode=e20161021&refcode2=e20161021nd&amount=25)
---
Friend --

There are good October surprises and bad October surprises. Donald Trump has been on the receiving end of quite a few of the bad ones lately. But I'm here to talk about the other kind, and how it relates to the U.S. Senate.

See, my friend Katie McGinty is running for Senate in Pennsylvania. For months, her race has been closer than close, a true toss-up. But with just a couple of weeks left till Election Day, we can change that _and_ give Katie a humongous October surprise (the good kind!) **[by raising $20,000 in grassroots contributions _in one day_. Chip in by midnight tonight! >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4953481448578351104/9015951367298088960?refcode=e20161021&refcode2=e20161021nd&amount=25)**

You could call it a Halloween surprise. Or a November 1st surprise (the day when monthly totals are calculated). In fact, I don't care what you call it, **as long as we can call it a victory on election night.**

**[Pitch in today to elect Katie and help Democrats retake the Senate majority.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4953481448578351104/9015951367298088960?refcode=e20161021&refcode2=e20161021nd&amount=25)**

Look, I don't have to spook you with Halloween tales about how scary a Republican controlled Senate is. You've seen it with your own eyes for the last two years. **Democrats need to take back the chamber, and the only way to do that is to win Pennsylvania.**

And that's why _we all need to care about this race_ -- not just Pennsylvanians but all Americans. On top of that, I know Katie will be a fantastic senator and fighter for Democratic values.

**So what do you say?[Will you help me give Katie the best (October) surprise of her life with the news that her supporters raised _$20,000_ in 24 hours to help her win her race?](https://act.myngp.com/el/4953481448578351104/9015951367298088960?refcode=e20161021&refcode2=e20161021nd&amount=25)**

**[www.katiemcginty.com/donate](https://act.myngp.com/el/4953481448578351104/9015951367298088960?refcode=e20161021&refcode2=e20161021nd&amount=25)**

Thanks,
Al

P.S. It's not too late to help shape this election -- but it will be soon. **[Please pitch in to help Katie.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4953481448578351104/9015951367298088960?refcode=e20161021&refcode2=e20161021nd&amount=25)**
| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 18 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/4953481448578351104/9015951367298088960?refcode=e20161021&refcode2=e20161021nd&amount=25)**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4953481448578351104/-7917583231614976000).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: listen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Donald Trump is listening to the voices of millions of Americans who want a new direction in Washington. Add your voice and guide his campaign to victory over the Obama-Clinton liberals. |

Friend- The politicians and liberal elites have not been listening to you. But I hear you loud and clear. That’s why I am the people’s candidate for president with a rising movement of pro-America voters ready to take back our country. As one of my best and most loyal supporters, you can do a lot to help finish this race strong and send Crooked Hillary down to defeat. Please take a minute right now to complete our Listening to America Survey so I can hear your voice at this important moment in the race. You have my word I will take action on YOUR concerns and speak up for YOUR interests. That’s what I’ve been doing this whole time. When I said we should not be letting tens of thousands of Syrian refugees into our country if we don't know who they are, the liberal elites screamed out against me, but they were not listening to you. When I said we should build a real border wall because if you don’t have a border, you don’t have a country, they raged against me on TV, but they were not listening to you. When I said China is ripping us off with all these stupid trade deals, the liberal elites screamed about their globalist economic theories, but they were not listening to you. Well I have been listening to you, Friend. I have been taking you seriously. And I will not let you down. So our campaign – our pro-America movement – is taking a new approach that hasn’t been tried before by the D.C. insiders. I am campaigning on a message that seeks to represent the American people only, NOT lobbyists, NOT the media, and NOT corporate elites. The reason I have surged in the polls from 'day one' of this race is because I have been listening to you – the great silent majority of Americans - and keeping you and other supporters engaged every step along the way. With just a few weeks to go before Election Day, I need you to stay engaged more than ever, so please complete our Listening to America Survey. In addition to your valuable answers, I also hope I can count on you to make a special donation in support of our campaign at this critical time. Crooked Hillary has tons of money from the liberal elites who have rigged everything against you. The media are in her corner too, and frankly I don’t think I’ve seen the media in this country behave in such a disgusting way as they have against me. So many lies! So help me cut through the media nonsense and take our message right to the people. Complete our Listening to America Survey Thank you, Donald Trump

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I want you there on Election Night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We're choosing one lucky supporter and a guest, and flying them out to the Election Night Party on November 8th. |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38280574:W3gFFkuNc:m:1:876315805:1FE275201D9EA0CB6BD1C73E7A095C0B:r)
Peter, can you imagine our Trump election night party in New York?

**It 's going to be a HUGE night...the party of the year,** because it'll be a party celebrating America's future and the American people rising up to take back our country.

And Peter I want you to be there with us when it happens!

We're choosing one lucky supporter and a guest, and flying them out to the Election Night Party on November 8th.

[**All you have to do is contribute $3 to be automatically entered to win.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38280574:W3gFFkuNc:m:1:876315805:1FE275201D9EA0CB6BD1C73E7A095C0B:r)

Peter, by doing your part and joining Team Trump today, you'll make sure we win in November, and that our party is __a jubilant celebration of true patriots who defeated the liberal elites__.

Believe me, I will do my part when I become president and take care of the American people. Our campaign has been gaining supporters every day; it's a movement of patriotic Americans who are tired of being ignored by the Washington liberals and lobbyist insiders.

I'm proud to be your voice, Peter, and once I'm president, I'm going to be honored to fight on your behalf to make America safe, successful and respected worldwide once again.

Our Election Night Party is going to be a huge celebration for the American people, and I want you to have the chance to be there.

[**Just contribute $3, and you 'll be automatically entered to win a chance to be in New York with me on Election Night!**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38280574:W3gFFkuNc:m:1:876315805:1FE275201D9EA0CB6BD1C73E7A095C0B:r)

Good luck!

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38280574:W3gFFkuNc:m:1:876315805:1FE275201D9EA0CB6BD1C73E7A095C0B:r)

Donald J. Trump
**[ENTER NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38280574:W3gFFkuNc:m:1:876315805:1FE275201D9EA0CB6BD1C73E7A095C0B:r)** | No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again Committee by clicking [here.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38280575:W3gFFkuNc:m:1:876315805:1FE275201D9EA0CB6BD1C73E7A095C0B:r) Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38280576:W3gFFkuNc:m:1:876315805:1FE275201D9EA0CB6BD1C73E7A095C0B:r) Entries must be received between October 4, 2016 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on November 3, 2016 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: Round trip airfare for the winner and one guest to New York, hotel accommodations for one (1) night for the winner and one guest, ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, and admittance for winner and guest to Trump Campaign Election Night Party in New York, New York. (approximate retail value $2,000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38280577:W3gFFkuNc:m:1:876315805:1FE275201D9EA0CB6BD1C73E7A095C0B:r) for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915.

clean_body: "" "" Hello, Tonight, I'm handing Governor Hassan the official list of Victory Donors. Victory Donors are a special group of people who are willing to raise their hands for the final stretch and say, "Yes, I'm all in to elect Governor Hassan to the Senate, win back the majority, and ensure that our next Supreme Court justices work for the people and aren't beholden to special interests." Want to be on that list? You can do so here: "" We're in a virtual TIE, and our race is the tipping point between a Democratic Senate and letting Washington Republicans hold on to the majority, handing them the power to confirm our next Supreme Court justices. Nate Silver even says that New Hampshire voters have more power than anyone else in the country to determine who controls the Senate, so this is a list that you absolutely NEED to be on: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks for getting your name on the record! Emily Mellencamp Smith Finance Director, Maggie for NH P.S. -- If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline, thank you! Those gifts can take a little bit of time to process and may not be reflected here, but don't worry, we have it recorded. ""

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eric=20Trump?=
subject: AGENDA: First 100 Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
My father is ready to get to work as President of the United States. Here’s his agenda. |

Friend, My father is a man who gets results. He’s proven it for decades in business, and he’s proven it throughout this campaign. Most importantly, he’s determined to get results in the White House to Make America Great Again... that’s why he’s in this race. Donald J. Trump wants to go to Washington to stop the corruption, end the rigged system and hold the career politicians and the bureaucrats accountable. He wants to fight for YOU and every American, and right now getting you involved in the campaign is more important than ever – we only have 18 days to go. It’s now or never – we need you on board. Help fund our voter outreach and get-out-the-vote efforts with a $3, $5, $10, $25, $50, $75 or $100 contribution. FUND TRUMP VICTORY CAMPAIGN You’ve seen how the Democrats, leftist radicals and the lying liberal media are stooping lower and lower to stop the Trump movement. They will lie, cheat and steal to put Hillary Clinton in the White House. But with your help, we can DEFEAT them on November 8th, to help make my father the 45th President of the United States. And when we do, he’ll get big results. This is what my father is determined to do in his first 100 days in office – this is what we’re fighting for. He will: • Appoint judges who will uphold our Constitution; • Immediately negotiate better trade deals; • Change federal immigration rules and cancel numerous regulations, to provide more high-paying jobs to our people; • Open up energy production to jumpstart our economy; • Repeal the Obamacare disaster to provide relief to American families. And this is just a start. But none of it will happen if we don’t win on Election Day. As we fight out these final weeks in key battleground states, we must continue reaching voters directly with my father’s message. When we do, I know we’ll come out on top. Please join our efforts today with your most generous possible contribution, to help us finish strong in the final stretch to Election Day. For America, Eric Trump P.S. Be part of history – help my father WIN on Election Day and Make America Great Again! Help us finish this race strong, so he can get to work on behalf of the American people. Thank you. FUND TRUMP VICTORY CAMPAIGN

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

This has happened before, friends. In 2014, special interest groups emptied their wallets in North Carolina. They spent more than $35 million on brutal attacks -- making our race the most expensive US Senate race of all time. Now, they're trying to do it again. **The Koch brothers' super PAC announced that they're doing everything they can to defeat Roy in November. | | Hi there,

This is major.

As Donald Trump falls in the polls, other Republicans are becoming imperiled too. That means we can clean out some of the worst Republicans in the House this year, even more than we'd thought possible before.

We have 21 women running for red-to-blue House seats across 13 states. The current climate could give our women an even greater advantage going into Election Day, but only if they have the resources to defeat their Republican opponents.

Our campaigns are doing all they can to shore up support to tackle these last few weeks.

**Donate $3 to help our candidates capitalize on the moment and defeat Republicans up and down the ballot in November:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Clean-Out-The-House](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b78/24c69fd9/db423bb/18ea6dc6/3657580785/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161021_email_HouseRepubnonopen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgCleanOutTheHouse&utm_campaign=WPEFEV57N_digital_email_20161021_HouseRepubsnonopen_n-all&source=WPEFEV57N_digital_email_20161021_HouseRepubsnonopen_n-all")**

Lucinda Guinn

name: Trump Team Virginia
subject: Gain Priority Entrance to see Mr. Trump TOMORROW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
Peter --

With only 18 days left until Election Day, Mr. Trump’s visits to the Commonwealth are numbered. TOMORROW, 10/22, we are expecting a large crowd of supporters to welcome Mr. Trump to Virginia Beach. By coming out Saturday morning and knocking 50 doors, you can skip the line and gain special access to the event.
[Click here to sign up to knock 50 doors this Saturday.](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__www.eventbrite.com_e_trump-2Dvirginia-2Dbeach-2Dvip-2Drally-2Daccess-2Dcompetition-2Dtickets-2D28770914580%26d%3DDQMFAg%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DG_FdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw%26m%3Dd0ANPkeQ5k1X7MEZGh3VcGZm2FSO2fIGnwEG-cgPjDI%26s%3DxAxmw_R4ELSOKrqPkBdwP4OMUlv9bifCcrg3GLAJP0U%26e%3D&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walkers&n=1)

name: Team Katie
subject: “Best choice for Senate in Pennsylvania”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8572225711694151680/2675727516890562560?refcode=e20161021.2&refcode2=e20161021.2nd&amount=25)
---
Wow, what a week --

Just days after the _Philadelphia Inquirer_ endorsed Katie, the _New York Times_ announced this morning they're endorsing Katie too!

_" Katie McGinty, the Best Choice for the Senate in Pennsylvania"_
Look, we've got all the momentum on our side, but we can't give up even an inch now. There are just 18 short days until Election Day, and nearly every poll still has this race still within the margin of error.

The _New York Times_ made it clear who we're up against (and why we HAVE to win):

_"[Toomey's] views on social issues jump right out of the Tea Party playbook: He is anti-abortion and voted to defund Planned Parenthood"_
**We 're $9,803 short of our 24-hour fundraising goal (kicked off this morning by Al Franken!) -- but the clock is ticking. [**Quick, can you pitch in $5 or more now? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8572225711694151680/2675727516890562560?refcode=e20161021.2&refcode2=e20161021.2nd&amount=25)**

18 days to win,

Team Katie
| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 18 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8572225711694151680/2675727516890562560?refcode=e20161021.2&refcode2=e20161021.2nd&amount=25)**

name: Bayh for Indiana
subject: Actions, not words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505a6/7be36b49/1e742a10/78f9c268/3302632385/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend -- Earlier this week, Evan and Congressman Todd Young took to the debate stage. It quickly became clear that **on the issues that matter most, only one candidate truly has Hoosiers ' best interests at heart:**

**_Social Security_**
* Congressman Young has called Social Security a "Ponzi scheme" and supports a plan that would cost seniors an additional $6,400 in out-of-pocket costs
* Evan has consistently fought to preserve and strengthen Social Security and Medicare to ensure our seniors are protected for years to come

**[Pitch in $5 now to elect a Senator who has fought for Social Security>>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505a6/7be36b49/1e742a10/78f9c26f/3302632385/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161021nd&amount=10")** **_Hoosier Jobs_**
* Congressman Young called the 2008 auto industry rescue "a waste" and said the industry should go "belly up"
* Evan reached across the aisle to rescue the auto industry, which ended up saving 100,000 Hoosier jobs

**[Pitch in $5 now to elect a Senator who has fought for Hoosier jobs>>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505a6/7be36b49/1e742a10/78f9c26f/3302632385/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161021nd&amount=10")** **_College Affordability_**
* Congressman Young has time and time again voted against legislation that would make college more affordable to students
* Evan's 21st Century Scholars Program, which he instituted as governor, has helped more than 70,000 Indiana students afford a college education

**[Pitch in just $5 now to elect a Senator who has fought to give Hoosier scholars a fair shot>>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505a6/7be36b49/1e742a10/78f9c26f/3302632385/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161021nd&amount=10")** Actions, not words, do the talking here. Evan is the clear choice because he can point to a long track record of putting Indiana families first.

But if Evan is going to come out on top and get to work for _**you**_ in Washington, he needs your support. **[Will you pitch in $5 right now?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505a6/7be36b49/1e742a10/78f9c26f/3302632385/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161021nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,

Team Bayh ********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505a6/7be36b49/1e742a10/78f9c26e/3302632385/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161021nd&amount=25")********
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505a6/7be36b49/1e742a10/78f9c26d/3302632385/VEsB/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: It’s happening right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We need to beat Hillary at the polls. Contribute to the TRUMP Early Voting Fund. |

Friend, I have no doubt in my mind that you’re going to make it to the polls to vote. You’ve been a strong supporter. You’ve shared your opinion, you’ve taken surveys, you’ve taken action -- and you’ve made a big impact. I know you’ll be there no matter what. But let’s be honest, there are some people out there that will wait until Election Day to vote and something will come up -- something outside of their control, or they just won’t be able to wait in the long line. That’s why getting our supporters to vote RIGHT NOW in states with early voting is so important. Early voting is happening in many states right this second. There’s no time to wait. We have to act NOW. We’ve determined it costs on average $38 to get 1 person out to vote early. Will you help out our fellow Americans who might face emergencies on Election Day by contributing to our TRUMP Early Voting Fund? CONTRIBUTE $190 TO TURN OUT 5 VOTERS CONTRIBUTE $152 TO TURN OUT 4 VOTERS CONTRIBUTE $114 TO TURN OUT 3 VOTERS CONTRIBUTE $76 TO TURN OUT 2 VOTERS CONTRIBUTE $38 TO TURN OUT 1 VOTER CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT I don’t want the fate of our country to be decided by a few people who stayed home, but would have voted -- IF ONLY we had gotten them to vote in time. I won’t be able to sleep at night knowing that we waited too long to start getting our supporters to vote. This is the moment that matters most. All the work you’ve put in, all the time you’ve invested -- this is what you’ve been doing it for. It’s game time. This is it. And it’s simple: without the votes, we cannot win. Contribute $38 to turn out just 1 voter early in a battleground state that could swing the election. Thank you, Donald J. Trump
CONTRIBUTE $38 TO TURN OUT 1 VOTER

JOIN US IN VIRGINIA BEACH, VA TOMORROW!
| Dear Peter,

Remember to get your tickets to join Donald Trump and team in Virginia Beach, VA **tomorrow at********3:00 PM** for a rally! [Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fvirginia-beach-va3%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=va_beach_20&n=2 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/virginia-beach-va3/"). Details about the event are below:

******Saturday, October 22nd** : Virginia Beach**** Regent University
1000 Regent University Drive
Virginia Beach, VA 23464

Gates Open: 12:00 PM
Event Begins: 3:00 PM
[Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fvirginia-beach-va3%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=va_beach_20&n=3 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/virginia-beach-va3/").
Please check our Schedule page for parking details._

_ Please limit personal items and arrive early to expedite entrance into the venue - please note, **NO homemade signs, banners, professional cameras with a detachable lens, tripods, monopods, selfie sticks, back packs or large bags will be permitted into the venue.**

We hope to see you there! Sincerely,

Team Trump–Pence

* * *

clean_body: "" "" This isn't great, team. We need to sign up 1,000 Victory Donors by midnight tonight so that we can build up resources to win our make-or-break Senate race, and right now we're falling short. Can you help out? Here's the link: "" If Governor Hassan loses here in New Hampshire, we're practically guaranteed to hand Senate control to Washington Republicans, giving them free reign to confirm out-of-touch, far-right justices to the Supreme Court. The best way to stop that from happening is to build up our list of Victory Donors -- a list of our very best supporters who are committed to electing Governor Hassan to the Senate -- by midnight tonight. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" The deadline to get your name on this V.I.P. list is just a few hours away, so rush your donation in now. -- Team Maggie ""

subject: Join Me On Election Night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We’re choosing one lucky supporter and a guest, and flying them out to the Election Night Party on November 8th . |

Friend, can you imagine our Trump election night party in New York? It’s going to be a HUGE night . . . the party of the year, because it’ll be a party celebrating America’s future and the American people rising up to take back our country. And Friend; I want you to be there with us when it happens. We’re choosing one lucky supporter and a guest, and flying them out to the Election Night Party on November 8th. All you have to do is contribute $3 to be automatically entered to win. Friend, by doing your part and joining Team Trump today, you’ll make sure we win in November, and that our party is a jubilant celebration of true patriots who defeated the liberal elites. Believe me, I will do my part when I become president and take care of the American people. Our campaign has been gaining supporters every day; it’s a movement of patriotic Americans who are tired of being ignored by the Washington liberals and lobbyist insiders. I’m proud to be your voice, Friend, and once I’m president, I’m going to be honored to fight on your behalf to make America safe, successful and respected worldwide once again. Our Election Night Party is going to be a huge celebration for the American people, and I want you to have the chance to be there. Just contribute $3, and you’ll be automatically entered to win a chance to be in New York with me on Election Night. Good luck, Donald Trump
ENTER NOW

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. Entries must be received between October 4, 2016 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on November 3, 2016 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: Round trip airfare for the winner and one guest to New York, hotel accommodations for one (1) night for the winner and one guest, ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, and admittance for winner and guest to Trump Campaign Election Night Party in New York, New York. (approximate retail value $2,000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915.
Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Dear Peter, **Today I was able to make my criminal complaint after this President of a 4.2 Billion Dollar Pharmaceutical Firm came to my home town to threaten me.**
---
[ ](https://u3600396.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=Ept3eUXUTOqi1x3JGzXRbXaG3KX5kcffEdOsQijnjeP-2Bibd2V616-2BBsxozOmA3diPiJOc6jlwzbLF3Elwb6KLZtzTR3GOMzA-2BhyU9pnxstOsqhfB-2Fmcsn66EeZeKcMQ54wNFmqFnItl4xl2RkfDTNg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz0DCKsot10eGO4g1hWwNpsCOCBxq4llkdlSAzIFOJzxktePnZ2XJmLRznFktOzTNNpoEQX2i9n-2FO6lDzQRBmPxFtiCvUcObV48y82Md7Lj1PEEDQnJIWRpy74ZeqOSQfXQ-2FyAByjNcAXa3-2B9lTFyCR2WolZQ06HJ5sn-2BScDsfYFFX-2FUjmzNQo2tfgE7WxseYxfU5FvoIh8Vg9UlxZ0cDg-2Frsf27UEJhY63AB1rcT7s58FIxgor3Wh3Ws5nWPeemzpHmBGOZ8blfrgW-2BeNZp1cM8uSGN9Brzub4erFBSGXTiRNaq7i0OtnXqyYz7z5TgmA6H5n3QcMR-2B1Lm9F6RoYiUi57p7vkI0DMU5XsidUxckc-3D)
---
---
Companies like this have been buying and selling politicians across America to keep their fat contracts going. In fact, they have already given $100,000 to elect my opponent. They know that I'll end these crony deals because while pharmaceutical companies and crony contractors are getting rich, our troops don't have spare parts for their equipment and our Veterans are dying waiting for care. These establishment thugs thought they could bribe and threaten me, but I have lived a long life of honor and integrity. **Unfortunately for them, I am not worried about a political career.** I am the most heavily vetted candidate in this US Senate race due to my top secret security clearance that I held from age 17 until age 54. That's credibility. But that clearance has also allowed me to see how weak and vulnerable our nation is. We need people watching over our country, not their political careers. There is only one reason that I am going to Washington and that is to**** drain the swamp of corruption and take our country back from these establishment goons. **Listen, we only have 17 days to get our vote out. Don 't let them buy this election. We have tremendous momentum**. [**I know I have asked a lot of you, but can you help me end the week STRONG with an emergency $10, $25, $50, or $100 donation?**](https://u3600396.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=Ept3eUXUTOqi1x3JGzXRbXaG3KX5kcffEdOsQijnjeP-2Bibd2V616-2BBsxozOmA3diPiJOc6jlwzbLF3Elwb6KLZtzTR3GOMzA-2BhyU9pnxstOsqhfB-2Fmcsn66EeZeKcMQ54wNFmqFnItl4xl2RkfDTNg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz0DCKsot10eGO4g1hWwNpsCOCBxq4llkdlSAzIFOJzxktePnZ2XJmLRznFktOzTNNpoEQX2i9n-2FO6lDzQRBmPxFtiCvUcObV48y82Md7Lj1PEEDQnJIWRpy74ZeqOSQfXQ-2FyAByjNcAXa3-2B9lTFyCRyYOtsPtKy7Rk3JtJMnQQDw6hlnHX0pt-2F-2FgMjbzTfB5RH6iizLeqpwAvd57QNWA22xPc-2BtGdq8ab1uUKX5CJfoHsrcbC3c8CzrBiQa0OYtoMS51CF0iPmt3DfbfyYKoyH-2F6h10pr9Cj-2BDrIJkYqab0OQ-2FR36Ifzc-2BrsNHBWB-2F1rCdglFvkWe4J187LtPM6IUDSRS1PSYvwrYZJk-2BHmsobzE-3D)

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, Today I was able to make my criminal complaint after this President of a 4.2 Billion Dollar Pharmaceutical Firm came to my home town to threaten me. Companies like this have been buying and selling politicians across America to keep their fat contracts going. In fact, they have already given $100,000 to elect my opponent. They know that I'll end these crony deals because while pharmaceutical companies and crony contractors are getting rich, our troops don't have spare parts for their equipment and our Veterans are dying waiting for care. These establishment thugs thought they could bribe and threaten me, but I have lived a long life of honor and integrity. Unfortunately for them, I am not worried about a political career. I am the most heavily vetted candidate in this US Senate race due to my top secret security clearance that I held from age 17 until age 54. That's credibility. But that clearance has also allowed me to see how weak and vulnerable our nation is. We need people watching over our country, not their political careers. There is only one reason that I am going to Washington and that is to** drain the swamp of corruption and take our country back from these establishment goons. Listen, we only have 17 days to get our vote out. Don 't let them buy this election. We have tremendous momentum. | Sincerely, Col. Rob Maness | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLONEL ROB MANESS** Friends of Colonel Rob Maness · United States

name: Carly Fiorina
subject: Our last line of defense
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR AMERICA
body:
| | | | We must make sure conservatives keep control of the House and Senate.
---
---
| | | [](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/11yYrlCC65fRxV3jkCRMMmN)
---
| | |
## Peter,
## ****The mainstream media won't tell you this story --but the most critical way we can save our country is to _make sure conservatives keep control of the House and Senate._
---
| We need to make sure we have the strongest voice possible in Washington. That means keeping our Republican majority in both houses of Congress--so we can continue to lead the fight to take our country back. **That 's why, over the past 4 months, my team and I have repurposed the nationwide resources, influence, and expertise of a presidential campaign to work on statewide and local races.** **I 've been out on the road for months myself--campaigning for [**dozens of candidates**](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/11yYCRXVbpuIK1d5qKkT1iK) all across our nation.** Our team has amplified their media attention, helped them raise the funds they need to stay competitive, and--most importantly--is helping to make sure their message reaches massive numbers of conservative voters directly, over Facebook, Twitter, and email. **We are doing everything we can do to move the dial and help them win.** [**See the full list**](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/11yYOojegJJzW7mRwRNZgeH) (so far!) of statewide and local candidates that I've been working hard to elect in 2016: [ ](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/11yYZUExm3Yr8dwDCZh5vaE) **...and many more to come!** The liberal Left is hoping for a clean sweep of Washington in 2016--every branch of government. And if they do, our nation as we know it could be in jeopardy. **We must come together as conservatives, as much as we can, in the weeks to come.** Our team is working hard to build the strongest defense possible against the crushing tide of far-Left ideology. Don't forget what matters most on November 8th: sending the strongest conservatives we can to represent us in Washington. We must keep fighting together. More to come soon! **Carly** P.S. With just a few weeks left until election day, we need every conservative on deck to keep the House and Senate in Republican hands. [**Can I count you in for just $13?**](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/11yZbqZQrodikjGpJ6KbK6B)
---
| [ DONATE NOW ](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/11yZmXl9wIs9wpQbPedhZ2y "DONATE NOW")
---

The only way to save our country: **making sure conservatives keep control of the House and Senate.** [**_Will you chip in, right away?_**](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/11yZytGsC2H0IvZXVlGodYv)
| | [DONATE $13](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/11yZK01LHmVRUC9K1t9usUs) | [Donate $25](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/11z072InS1pAiOtidI5GWMm) | [Donate $50](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/c/11z0iz3GXlEruUD4jPyNbIj)
---|---|---
---

| | |
##### PAID FOR BY CARLY FOR AMERICA

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](http://carlyforpresident.msgfocus.com/u/1aGI9DA1qQHPjwWu9vUg) if you would prefer to not receive future emails from Carly for America.
---

name: Jordan, Campaign Manager
subject: Halloween surprise
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Hey -- did you see Senator Al Franken's note this morning?

We're just **$2,945 short** of our 24-hour fundraising goal, and let me tell you, we need every dollar now. Every donation that comes in urgently goes right back out the door to help us reach the undecided voters who will swing this race.

[**Can you pitch in $5 or more to help us reach our goal? We 're SO close -- put us over the top now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4359944988637790208/-4025065778683314176?refcode=e20161021.3&refcode2=e20161021.3nd&amount=25)

[**www.katiemcginty.com/donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4359944988637790208/-4025065778683314176?refcode=e20161021.3&refcode2=e20161021.3nd&amount=25)

We're counting on you,

Jordan
Campaign Manager

\-------
_From: Senator Al Franken
Subject: Halloween Suprise
Date: October 21, 2016 at 10:00 AM_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4359944988637790208/-4025065778683314176?refcode=e20161021.3&refcode2=e20161021.3nd&amount=25)

Friend --

There are good October surprises and bad October surprises. Donald Trump has been on the receiving end of quite a few of the bad ones lately. But I'm here to talk about the other kind, and how it relates to the U.S. Senate.

See, my friend Katie McGinty is running for Senate in Pennsylvania. For months, her race has been closer than close, a true toss-up. But with just a couple of weeks left till Election Day, we can change that _and_ give Katie a humongous October surprise (the good kind!) **[by raising $20,000 in grassroots contributions _in one day_. Chip in by midnight tonight! >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4359944988637790208/-4025065778683314176?refcode=e20161021.3&refcode2=e20161021.3nd&amount=25)**

You could call it a Halloween surprise. Or a November 1st surprise (the day when monthly totals are calculated). In fact, I don't care what you call it, **as long as we can call it a victory on election night.**

**[Pitch in today to elect Katie and help Democrats retake the Senate majority.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4359944988637790208/-4025065778683314176?refcode=e20161021.3&refcode2=e20161021.3nd&amount=25)**

Look, I don't have to spook you with Halloween tales about how scary a Republican controlled Senate is. You've seen it with your own eyes for the last two years. **Democrats need to take back the chamber, and the only way to do that is to win Pennsylvania.**

And that's why _we all need to care about this race_ -- not just Pennsylvanians but all Americans. On top of that, I know Katie will be a fantastic senator and fighter for Democratic values.

**So what do you say?[Will you help me give Katie the best (October) surprise of her life with the news that her supporters raised _$20,000_ in 24 hours to help her win her race?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4359944988637790208/-4025065778683314176?refcode=e20161021.3&refcode2=e20161021.3nd&amount=25)**

**[www.katiemcginty.com/donate](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4359944988637790208/-4025065778683314176?refcode=e20161021.3&refcode2=e20161021.3nd&amount=25)**

Thanks,
Al

P.S. It's not too late to help shape this election -- but it will be soon. **[Please pitch in to help Katie.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4359944988637790208/-4025065778683314176?refcode=e20161021.3&refcode2=e20161021.3nd&amount=25)**
---
| *** A note on donations ***

There are only 18 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4359944988637790208/-4025065778683314176?refcode=e20161021.3&refcode2=e20161021.3nd&amount=25)**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4359944988637790208/-4097123372721242112).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

Look, I don't have to spook you with Halloween tales about how scary a Republican controlled Senate is. You've seen it with your own eyes for the last two years. Democrats need to take back the chamber, and the only way to do that is to win Pennsylvania. And that's why we all need to care about this race -- not just Pennsylvanians but all Americans. On top of that, I know Katie will be a fantastic senator and fighter for Democratic values. So what do you say? Thanks, Al P.S. It's not too late to help shape this election -- but it will be soon. | * A note on donations There are only 18 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate? Chip in $5 today. Thank you. ** | | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

body:
My son Eric came up with an amazing idea – this is how we’ll win huge. |

Friend, Eric sent out a great email last week – you may or may not have seen it. If you missed it, you can read in full it below. He came up with a Big League idea, and it’s simple: If we can get every one of my supporters to contribute $20.17, just one time, Crooked Hillary’s big spending special interest cronies won’t be able to save her. We’ll shake up this race big time, leave nothing to chance and WIN HUGE on November 8th so I can get to work for YOU and all of the American people. CONTRIBUTE $20.17 TO TRUMP VICTORY Money isn’t everything in an election. I’ve proven that in this race. But for Hillary Clinton, believe me, money is everything – she would have zero chance without her big dollar donors, nasty TV ads and the lying liberal media. If we harness the power of our movement – the most powerful grassroots movement our country has ever seen – we’ll shock everyone with how big we win on Election Day. Eric’s plan is tremendous. Help us make it a huge success. The response so far has been amazing, and every day he sends me a list of those who are joining us. Help me win in 18 days and Make America Great Again! Best wishes, Donald J. It may seem like a strange question, I know. But here’s what I’m getting at. If every one of my father’s supporters who has not yet donated made a one-time contribution of just $20.17, Hillary Clinton’s big-dollar fundraising advantage would be completely wiped away. We’d absolutely blow her numbers out of the water. And why $20.17? Because that’s the year we’re going to change our nation’s course, when my father takes the oath of office and gets to work to Make America Great Again. So I’m making a list, and I’m going to share it with my father tomorrow. It will include the name of every supporter who joins today to help us finish strong and WIN in 24 days. I’d love to add you name to the list. Please JOIN Team Trump today with a $20.17 special contribution – or more if you can – by following this secure link.

Sincerely, Eric Trump P.S. Help us fight back against the Clinton campaign machine, her insider cronies and the lying liberal media – they are DESPERATE to tear down my father and our Republican Party, so they can maintain their grip on power and protect the rigged system in Washington. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

---

| Greetings,
---
| This was an exciting week filled with notable endorsements, Phil’s strong debate performances demonstrating the clear contrast in this election and, as always, incredible enthusiasm from supporters around the state. Check out this week’s highlights from the state’s most energetic and hardworking campaign.

**EARLY VOTING STILL GOING STRONG**
Early voting is open now, so click [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=834d645638&e=19cebfe173) to find your town clerk's location or to request an absentee ballot, and get those votes in for Phil now. We’re so encouraged by all of the early voting support we’re hearing about on social media. **Let’s keep rolling straight through to a strong victory on November 8!**

Voted early for Phil? Share your support with us on Twitter and Facebook: [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6d80dbb4c1&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=82c26ea478&e=19cebfe173)
***
**PHIL’S ECONOMIC PLAN: PRO-JOBS TAX POLICIES**
This probably won’t come as a surprise to any of you: Vermont is a high tax state. Making Vermont more affordable will be one of Phil’s top priorities, and taxes are a big focus. Phil’s outlined several **proposals to simplify tax laws, benchmark spending against specific outcomes and create a more welcoming and predictable environment for job creators**. These proposals are part of his comprehensive economic development plan, which you can view [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ff514fc992&e=19cebfe173).
Phil will work to make state government more efficient and he will propose investing a portion of those savings in **lowering the personal and business tax burden across the board**. He’ll create a more welcoming environment for retirees and veterans **by phasing out the tax on both social security and military retirement benefits**. He’ll also work to **restore the full Research & Development tax credit and the film production tax credit**. He’ll explore a number of approaches to **encourage investment of private capital** and **establish a real angel investor tax credit**. A Phil Scott Administration will **use the tax code strategically to stimulate economic growth.**
Read more about these proposals [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=079a60a035&e=19cebfe173) (beginning on page 21).

Photo Credit: @PhilScottVT ***
**PHIL EARNS ENDORSEMENT OF MULTIPLE LAW ENFORCEMENT GROUPS**
Citing his leadership on law enforcement issues and commitment to public safety, both **the Vermont Police Association and the Vermont Troopers Association this week endorsed Phil for Governor**.

“During Mr. Scott’s years of public service as Senator and Lt. Governor, he has demonstrated **a true commitment to public safety legislation serving Vermont’s best interest**. Lt. Governor **Scott fully understands the challenges posed by the array of public safety issues Vermont must address**. The Vermont Police Association believes that **Mr. Scott can be relied upon to address those issues** ,” said George P. Merkel, President of the Vermont Police Association. Read the full endorsement [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=47d82e7791&e=19cebfe173).

“Lt. Governor Scott has said on many occasions that a critical role of government is ensuring public safety. **We look forward to working with him in the future to improve fair and impartial law enforcement standards, combat the opiate epidemic, and address the array of issues Troopers face every day in Vermont** ,” said Sgt. Michael O’Neil, President of the Vermont Troopers Association. Read the full endorsement [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6709b9b340&e=19cebfe173).
*******
**BIPARTISAN SUPPORT FOR PHIL CONTINUES TO GROW**
Throughout Phil’s entire career he has made a practice of listening to all perspectives and considering any idea that will help improve the lives of Vermonters, regardless of which party it comes from. He’s always willing to work across the aisle, and understands that **we must work together in order to make real progress.**
That leadership style, along with his pro-growth plans and commitment to addressing our crisis of affordability, has attracted support from Vermonters of all political parties. That support is on full display in a new television ad highlighting some of the **many Vermont Democrats who plan to vote for Phil on November 8.**

“Everywhere I go, in my Senate district and throughout Vermont, **I hear from self-proclaimed Democrats that Phil Scott is the clear choice in this election for Governor** ,” said **Sen. Dick Mazza (D-Grand Isle)** in the ad. “Most importantly, Phil will provide the balance we need in Montpelier to **ensure we’re all focused on growing the economy and making Vermont more affordable so we can invest in our children, communities and future**. He’ll be **a Governor for every Vermonter,** not just one side or the other,” Mazza concludes.

Read the official press release [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3e6c212819&e=19cebfe173) and watch it below.

---
| [ ](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=bc87be3b42&e=19cebfe173)
---
Phil Scott for Vermont: Democrats for Phil
| *******
**AND DOWN THE STRETCH WE GO!**
We made the rounds again this week with stops across the state, giving Phil the opportunity to meet with so many great people, from students to seniors; from young professionals to seasoned industry veterans! Phil met with the **Vermont Town & City Management Association** in **Stowe** , the **Vermont Community Development Association** at **Castleton** , and **Young Professionals** in **Rutland** and **Burlington**. He also stopped into the **Wayside in Montpelier** , the **14 th Star Brewery in St. Albans**, **Fab-Tech in Colchester** , attended the **CVU Craft Fair** , and met with residents in **Chittenden** and **St. Albans**. Taking some time to ensure Vermont’s school-age children get a lesson in the importance of public service, Phil visited students at **Burr and Burton Academy** and had a video conference with **1 st and 2nd graders from Waitsfield**.
**Photo credit: @PhilScott4VT**
Stay up-to-date on our upcoming events [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=853091be49&e=19cebfe173).
***
**ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS**

**_Connecting with students at Burr and Burton Academy_**
“Scott's address focused on **education as an economic engine** for the state. He said he wants to **_invest_ in early childhood programs and _reduce the cost_ of K-12 education while building flexibility into Act 46 to _maintain or expand school choice_**. He said early childhood services need to be more widely available, more comprehensive and more affordable, while administrative costs for K-12 schools need to be reduced.” (Source: Bennington Banner: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b43af4a300&e=19cebfe173))

**_VPR poll shows Phil most trusted candidate on the economy and affordability_**
“Scott — whose campaign has focused on making the state more affordable and tightening the budget — was seen as t**he more trustworthy candidate for voters with anxiety about the economy and cost of living**. On the trustworthiness question, **_voters picked Scott over Minter_ 41 percent to 28 percent**.” (Source: VT Digger: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c29e6e91ec&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil on energy goals and affordability_**
"What we should be doing is **increasing our focus on becoming energy independent** by 2050.” (Source: WCAX: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c38366db79&e=19cebfe173))

**_Deerfield Valley News: Economy top priority for Phil_**
“I believe we can do better, so (the economy) is going to be my focus. That’s what I think this election is all about—restoring faith and trust, solving the issue of affordability, and focusing on the economy so we have more prosperity for everyone.” (Source: Deerfield Valley News: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f4968de768&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil Scott is my man_**
“He knows how to sit down at the table and negotiate with others so there is **progress rather than impasse**. He is realistic about our future and **dedicated to allowing Vermonters to be freely independent, able to find a good job/business to support themselves and their families**.” – Mary Daly, Chairwoman, Orange County Republican Committee (Source: Burlington Free Press: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=001195e009&e=19cebfe173))

**_Support for Scott_**
“Phil Scott has been our Lt. Governor for many years, and has the ability to work with both parties. **He understands the needs of the people of Vermont** and will work to resolve the problems we now face.” – Stephen McConnel, Townshend (Source: Brattleboro Reformer: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2ad23a3dd7&e=19cebfe173))
***
**ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS**

**_A clear choice_**
This one is a #GoodWatch, rather than a #GoodRead, but ICYMI, the **WCAX** debate this week illustrated **the clear choice in this election** : Phil is the only candidate who will make the economy and affordability priorities in Montpelier come January. And **as Gov. Jim Douglas told Phil’s supporters after the debate,** “**Phil Scott distinguished himself as the clear leader**. He was passionate. He was focused. He laid out a vision for the future - to get our economy back on track and grow good jobs. Most importantly, he was gubernatorial.” Watch the full debate [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4bc8cd282f&e=19cebfe173).

**_Stowe Reporter: Phil Scott wants to lead, inspire, get the best from people_**
Phil sat down with the _Stowe Reporter_ and talked leadership, working across the aisle and, of course, the economy! As Phil told the _Reporter_ , he will work to make the state more predictable for businesses so that they can create more jobs, helping to raise wages. He’ll also work to retain and attract more young, working-age Vermonters with affordable housing options and explore greater incentives. Phil also talks about education spending and school choice, and his plan to address our opioid crisis. Read the full article [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=222cf6cecd&e=19cebfe173), and read more about each of Phil’s plans to grow our economy, make Vermont more affordable, and address critical challenges [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0500728379&e=19cebfe173).
*******
Thanks to everyone for continuing to follow and support our campaign. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities every day – and share your thoughts – [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9a3278b4b6&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=653a527c2f&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,
Team Scott
